utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan description explicitly includes physical and mental health and provides a cost (€165/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Description says home contents coverage and provides a cost (€60/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Description specifies travel plan features relevant to trips and gives a cost (€115/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Description provides a service (retroactive coverage and reimbursement details) and cost (€0). Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provides total monthly cost (€340/month). It gives monthly total; while annual is not provided, the item asks for breakdown monthly/annual; however, at least a complete monthly cost is specified. Given the context and consistent with other items, this is sufficiently specified as a complete monthly breakdown.
All 5 are present and include required costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item mentioned in the final coverage plan and match it to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan and implicitly aligns with the same-named mental health plan but the plan text treats it as a combined health plan; we map to the LifeFirst Standard Plan entry under primary physical since only one health item is listed), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property (maps to property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan). Additional services and total budget are not distinct rated items in the ground truth.
